forward_guidance.text: Netflix expects continued revenue growth driven by international expansion and content investments. The company is also focusing on improving operating margins.

key_risks.description: Foreign currency fluctuations could impact revenue and operating expenses.
Interest rate changes may affect the market values of investments and debt.

bull_case: Strong revenue growth across all regions, particularly in APAC with a 20% increase (MD&A chunk 65).
High operating margin of 32.3% indicates efficient cost management (Financial Statements chunk 57).
bear_case: Foreign currency fluctuations pose a risk to revenue and expenses (Quantitative Disclosures chunk 81).
Interest rate changes could negatively impact the value of Netflix's debt (Quantitative Disclosures chunk 81).
what_to_watch: Impact of foreign currency fluctuations on future earnings.
Netflix's ability to maintain or improve its operating margin.
Continued growth in international markets, especially APAC.
data_gaps: EPS estimate for the upcoming quarter is not available.
Revenue estimate for the upcoming quarter is not available.
